sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Moses tungah Vangliatna Lamdang Pia

verses.text: Tua ciangin Moses in dawngin, “Ahih hangin amaute in kei hong umloin ka thu hong ngailo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, ‘Nang tungah Topa hong kilanglo hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in ama kiangah, “Na khutsungah bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ciangkhut,” ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Lei-ah lawn in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in leilakah lawn a, gulpi khat a suak hi. Tua gulpi kiang panin Moses tai hi
Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Na khut zan in la a mei-in man in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut zanin man a, ama khutsungah ciangkhut a suakkik hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Amaute in a up theihna dingun Topa, amaute' Pasian, Abraham' Pasian, Isaac' Pasian, leh Jakob' Pasian, nang' tungah hong kilang khinzo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Na khut, na ang sungah koih in,” ci kik hi. Amah in a khut a ang sungah koih hi. Amah in a lak khiat kik ciangin, a khut phak a, vuk bangin a pak hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Na khut na ang sungah koih kik in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut a ang sungah koih kik hi. Amah in a lak khiat kik ciangin ama cilesa dangte mah bangin dam kik hi
Pasian in, “Amaute in nang hong up kei a, lim masa a thudon kei uh leh zong, amaute in lim nunung um khading uh hi

Amaute in hih lim nihte nangawn um loin na thu hong thudon kei leh, nangmah in Nail gun panin tui pawlkhat la-in lei keu tungah na sung ding a, Nail gun panin na lak tui pen lei keu tungah sisan suak ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “Oh, ka Topa aw, tumasiah hita leh na nasempa tungah thu na gen-a kipan hita leh, kei thugen a siam ka hi kei hi. Ka kam pau ol-in, ka pau awk hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Kua in mipa' kam bawl ahi hiam? Kua in amah pau theilo sak, bilngong sak, mu sak, mittaw sak ahi hiam? Topa ahi keimah hilo ka hi hiam
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in pai in. Keimah in na thugenna-ah kong huh ding a, na thugen ding nang kong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amah in, “Oh, ka Topa aw, hong thum ing; midang khat sawl zaw in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Moses tungah Topa heh a, amah in, “Levi mi na sanggampa Aaron om hilo ahi hiam? Amah in hoihtakin thu a gen theihna ka cian theih hi. En in, nangmah a dawn dingin amah hong paikhia a, amah in nang hong muh ciangin a lungsim sungah amah kipak ding hi
Nangmah in ama kiangah thu na gen ding a, thute amah na theisak ding hi. Keimah in na thugenna uhah kong huh ding a, na hih ding uh kong hilh ding hi
Amah in nang' tangin mite tungah thu gen ding hi. Amah in nang-a' dingin thu hong gensak ding a, nang in Pasian bangin na gen ding teng amah na sawl ding hi
Nangmah in limte na bawlna ding ahi hih ciangkhut na khutsungah na tawi ding hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin a sungpa Jethro' kiangah Moses pai-in ama kiangah, “Hong thum ing; Egypt-ah ka sanggamte kiangah kei hong ciahkik sakin amaute a nungta lai uh hiam hong mu sak in,” a ci hi. Jethro in Moses kiangah, “Cidam takin va ciahkik in,” a ci hi
Midian gam sungah Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah ciahkik in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang a hong that nuam mi khempeuh si khinta uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a zi leh a tapate la a, la khat tungah amaute tuang sakin, Egypt gamah ciah kik hi. Pasian in a tawi dingin a gen ciangkhut, Moses in ama khut sungah a tawi hi

Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah na ciahkik ciangin, nangma hih theih dingin vangliatna kong piaksa na lamdangte khempeuh Faro' mai-ah na hih ding thei in. Ahih hangin keimah in ama lungsim ka khauhsak ding a, amah in mite paisaklo ding hi
Nangmah in Faro' kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel pen ka tapa a suak masa hi a
nangma kiangah, “Amah in kei hong biak theihna dingin ka tapa paisak in,” kong ci hi. Amah paisak ding na nial leh, en in, na tapa a suak masa ka that ding hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Lampi-ah a giahna khatah Topa in Moses dawntuahin thah a sawm hi
Tua ciangin Zipporah in meisuang khat la-in a tapa' vun dawn at khiatsak a, tua tawh Moses lawngin, “Nang pen kei' tungah sisan tawh ka pasal na hi taktak hi!” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Moses thatlo hi. Tua ciangin tuanu in, vun atna hangin “Sisan tawh ka pasal na hi hi,” a ci hi
Tua laitakin Topa in Aaron kiangah, “Moses a dawn dingin sehnel gamah pai in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in, Pasian' mualah Moses dawnin a nam hi
Topa in amah a sawlna thute khempeuh leh ama sep dinga a sawl limte khempeuh Moses in Aaron' tungah a gen hi
Tua ciangin Moses leh Aaron pai-in Israel upate khempeuh a kaikhawm uh hi
Topa in Moses kianga a gensa thute khempeuh Aaron in gen a, Moses in mite' muhna-ah na lamdangte a lak hi
Mite in um uh hi. Israel mite kiangah Topa hawhin, amau' thuaknate amah in a muh khitna thu amaute in a zak uh ciangin, amaute in a lu uh kunin Pasian a bia uh hi.
